message:
feat(frankenctl): generalize benchmark score output path and strengthen bundle verify

The benchmark score command no longer requires --output results.json to
trigger bundle materialization. Any path now triggers materialization into
a <stem>.bundle/ directory with a copy at the requested path.

- BenchmarkScoreCommandOutput gains bundle_env_path and runtime fields
- Extract benchmark_bundle_runtime() as shared helper
- Update write_benchmark_score_output, materialize_benchmark_score_bundle,
  and benchmark_bundle_dir for generalized paths
- Add two new verify checks: bundle_env_runtime_contract_matches and
  bundle_env_runtime_feature_flag_present
- Update usage strings and test fixtures; add test for extensionless
  output path materialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
